_description: Sample Jira requirements JSON matching the dev-agents-shared requirements-reader output schema. Used by tests/generators/generate-from-jira.ts (JIRA_JSON env var) to generate test specs from Jira tickets.
_howToGenerate: Run '/read-jira GAAM-XXX' in Claude Code (dev-agents-shared plugin) to fetch real ticket data, or create manually following this schema.
title: Button component — add disabled state styling
user_stories: As a content author, I want the button to visually indicate a disabled state, so that users understand the action is unavailable
acceptance_criteria: Given a button with the 'disabled' style applied, the button should have reduced opacity (0.5)
Given a disabled button, the cursor should show 'not-allowed' on hover
Given a disabled button, clicking it should not trigger any navigation
Given a disabled button on a dark background (granite/azul), the disabled state should still be visible with sufficient contrast
technical_requirements: Use the existing 'disabled' cq:styleId from the style system
LESS styling should use the @c-ga-disabled opacity variable
non_functional_requirements: Must meet WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility requirements for disabled controls
Should work across all responsive breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop)
raw_description:
Add disabled state styling to the button component. The disabled style ID already exists in the style system but has no visual treatment.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Button with disabled style should have 0.5 opacity
- Cursor should be not-allowed
- Click should not navigate
- Must work on dark backgrounds with sufficient contrast

See Figma: https://www.figma.com/file/abc123/GA-Design-System?node-id=456
